en: And you, take up a lamentation for the princes of Israel,
zh: “你當為以色列的眾領袖作一首哀歌，

en: and say: What was your mother? A lioness! Among lions she crouched; in the midst of young lions she reared her cubs.
zh: 說： ‘你的母親是甚麼？ 是獅子群中的母獅， 牠臥在少壯獅子群中， 養育牠的小獅子。

en: And she brought up one of her cubs; he became a young lion, and he learned to catch prey; he devoured men.
zh: 牠養大其中一隻小獅子， 這幼獅成了一隻少壯的獅子， 學會了撕碎獵物， 把人吃掉。

en: The nations heard about him; he was caught in their pit, and they brought him with hooks to the land of Egypt.
zh: 列國聽見了， 就把牠困在他們的坑中； 他們用鈎子 把牠帶到埃及地去。

en: When she saw that she waited in vain, that her hope was lost, she took another of her cubs and made him a young lion.
zh: 母獅見自己所等候的落空了， 所希望的幻滅了， 就從牠的小獅子中另取出一隻， 使牠成為少壯的獅子。

en: He prowled among the lions; he became a young lion, and he learned to catch prey; he devoured men,
zh: 牠在獅子群中行走； 牠已成了一隻少壯的獅子， 牠學會了撕碎獵物， 把人吃掉。

en: and seized their widows. He laid waste their cities, and the land was appalled and all who were in it at the sound of his roaring.
zh: 牠拆毀了他們的城堡， 使他們的城市荒涼； 因牠吼叫的聲音， 地和其中所充滿的都驚恐。

en: Then the nations set against him from provinces on every side; they spread their net over him; he was taken in their pit.
zh: 於是四圍的列國 從各地來攻擊牠， 把他們的網撒在牠身上， 把牠困在他們的坑中。

en: With hooks they put him in a cage and brought him to the king of Babylon; they brought him into custody, that his voice should no more be heard on the mountains of Israel.
zh: 他們把牠放進籠裡， 用鈎子帶到巴比倫王那裡， 囚在獄中， 使牠的聲音在以色列眾山上不再聽見。

en: Your mother was like a vine in a vineyard planted by the water, fruitful and full of branches by reason of abundant water.
zh: “‘你的母親像葡萄園裡 的一棵葡萄樹， 栽種在水邊； 因為水源充足， 結果纍纍、枝葉茂盛。

en: Its strong stems became rulers' scepters; it towered aloft among the thick boughs; it was seen in its height with the mass of its branches.
zh: 它有粗壯的樹枝可作掌權者的杖； 它樹身高大，超乎其他茂密枝葉之上； 因為它樹身高大，枝子眾多，遠遠就可以看見。

en: But the vine was plucked up in fury, cast down to the ground; the east wind dried up its fruit; they were stripped off and withered. As for its strong stem, fire consumed it.
zh: 但這葡萄樹因 神的烈怒被拔起， 摔在地上； 東風使它的果子枯乾散掉， 粗壯的樹枝枯槁， 被火吞滅。

en: Now it is planted in the wilderness, in a dry and thirsty land.
zh: 現在它被栽種在曠野， 在乾旱無水之地。

en: And fire has gone out from the stem of its shoots, has consumed its fruit, so that there remains in it no strong stem, no scepter for ruling. This is a lamentation and has become a lamentation.
zh: 有火從樹枝中的一根發出， 吞滅樹的果子， 以致樹上再沒有粗壯的樹枝， 可以作掌權者的杖。’ 這是一首哀歌，是一首流行的哀歌。”
